message:
feat: integrate metal0 runtime for @logic_table compiled functions

- Add metal0 runtime and c_interop module dependencies to build.zig
- Update logic_table module to import and expose compiled VectorOps,
  FeatureEngineering, and RiskScoring structs from metal0
- vector_ops.zig now generated with proper imports for numpy functions
  (np.linalg.norm, np.sum, np.dot, etc.)
